meaning: 蒂朗岛[沙特阿拉伯西北部](在红海北端的蒂朗海峡中) ;蒂朗海峡(在红海同亚喀巴湾之间)
examples: French customs official Sebastien Tiran said France seizes at least a half-ton of ivory per year.
President Eisenhower made private assurances to Israel in 1957 that, if Egyptian President Nasser were to close the Straits of Tiran to Israeli shipping, the U.S. would use force to open them.
